_doc: Routing configuration for the dispatch-tasks pipeline. 'runners' maps task_type to runner+mode. 'destinations' maps domain -> deliverable -> {adapter, location}. Each destination also carries 'wall' for hard-barrier enforcement. Modeled on resources/model-tiers.json.

code._meaning: Code tasks run build-code inline (TDD loop needs HITL interactivity in the main thread).

triage._meaning: Triage tasks spawn export-tasks as an isolated agent (mechanical external writes, no interactivity needed).

reply._meaning: PR-reply tasks run relay inline (the reply drafts need main-thread HITL approval before any post; relay is currently copy-only). Ordered after the code branch so replies can cite the fixing commit.

code._meaning: Code deliverables park in the current repo's GitHub Issues with label 'triage'.

non-code._meaning: Non-code items land in personal Notion DB via REST API (separate workspace from SS, cannot use MCP).

code._meaning: Code deliverables park in the SS repo's GitHub Issues.

non-code._meaning: Non-code items land in Spawned Sapien Notion DB via MCP (SS workspace already connected to Claude).

standard-metrics._meaning: All Standard Metrics items route to Linear regardless of deliverable. Hard wall — no Notion or GitHub Issues for this domain.
